assessment.note: She names uncertainty about what would influence the next decision, which signals mild stalled growth and a flat, draining sense of progress; also reveals a strong off-signature clarity issue.

new_queue.label: Next decision
new_queue.name: The next decision — what do you think it turns on?
new_queue.description: Drills into her uncertainty about advancement criteria before moving the arc forward.

new_queue.label: Direction
new_queue.name: When you imagine yourself eighteen months from now, what's actually different?
new_queue.description: Probes whether they have a real picture of where they want to go.

new_queue.label: Manager investment
new_queue.name: What should I change in how I'm supporting your growth?
new_queue.description: Opens the manager's side of the investment conversation before asking for the employee's trade-offs.

new_queue.label: Your investment
new_queue.name: What would you need to change to make that path real?
new_queue.description: Surfaces her side of the investment and trade-offs required for the path she wants.

new_queue.label: Next weeks focus
new_queue.name: What would meaningful progress look like in the next two weeks?
new_queue.description: Creates an open commitment closer anchored in near-term movement.
